bracu_official.title: BRAC University crowned champion at EWU Robotfest 2026 for innovative quadruped robot
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University won the championship at EWU Robotfest 2026, showcasing their innovative quadruped robot. This achievement highlights the university's prowess in robotics and engineering.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2
bracu_official.summary: Public reporting has been issued concerning the contract signing for project B-113, specifically related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2. This report provides details on the recent contractual agreement.

bracu_official.summary: Public reporting has been issued concerning the contract signing for project B-113, specifically related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1. This report provides details on the recent contractual agreement.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a seminar focused on raising awareness about cervical cancer. The event aimed to educate the community on prevention and early detection.

bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event for Fall 2026 has been announced. Students should review the dates and plan their participation accordingly.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative to encourage sustainable choices among its community members. This effort promotes environmental responsibility within the campus.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice of award has been issued for project B-113, pertaining to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2. This marks an important development in the project's progress.
